# SESSION PROGRESS REPORT TEMPLATE
# PRP v3.1 §7 | LokDon Development Framework
# File naming: <INITIALS><DEV/PRO><YYYYMMDD><HHMM>PR.txt
# Example: JUDEV202605291430PR.txt
# ============================================================
# MANDATORY — Every session must produce a progress report.
# A session without a progress report is incomplete.
# ============================================================

SESSION END:

## 12. Session Verification Checklist (§10)
[ ] Backups exist and are valid
[ ] Git state recorded
[ ] Explicit approval obtained and documented
[ ] Code functions correctly — no errors present
[ ] Phase 5 Review completed and passed
[ ] Progress report filed (this document)
[ ] NPS-PROTOCOL.md updated
